net_summary: The two pages have distinct design and layout changes, making it difficult to categorize the overall change as purely improved, regressed, or neutral.

differences.before: Dark gray background with white text and a prominent search bar
differences.after: White background with a mix of colors and a less prominent search bar
differences.ux_impact: No clear impact on user experience

differences.after: Offset to the right and less prominent
differences.ux_impact: May affect discoverability of search functionality

differences.before: Bestselling kurtas with a pink background
differences.after: Exclusive coupon offer with a white background
differences.ux_impact: Changes the initial focus of the page

differences.before: Grid layout with various product categories
differences.after: Row layout with specific product promotions
differences.ux_impact: Changes the way products are presented
May affect user navigation and discovery

differences.before: Cart and account links on the top right
differences.after: Cart link on the top right, account link on the top right with a dropdown
differences.ux_impact: May affect accessibility of account information

differences.after: Less prominent location setting with a globe icon
differences.ux_impact: May affect user ability to change location
